seoTitle: Milpara vs Mimegarra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Milpara and Mimegarra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Milpara and Mimegarra.
heading: Milpara vs Mimegarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Milpara, Western Australia and Mimegarra, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Milpara has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mimegarra (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Milpara or Mimegarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Milpara has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mimegarra scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Milpara scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Mimegarra scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Milpara or Mimegarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Milpara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
